title: Double Dragon, 57 x 40 mm Premium Thermal Paper Till Receipt Roll for PDQ Credit Card Machine, POS, EPOS [Pack of 100]
features: ✅ PREMIUM HIGH QUALITY: Thermal Paper rolls crafted for optimal performance in credit card PDQ machines. Premium Quality guarantees clear, fast printing, meeting business demands.

✅ SINGLE ROLL DIMENSION: Width - 57mm, Diameter - 40mm (Dimensions are approximated and may vary slightly). Durable construction of the paper till rolls prevents deformation, ensuring long-lasting reliability for your business. Comes in Pack of 100.

✅ WIDE COMPATIBILITY: Suitable for Barclays, Barclaycard, Lloyds, Clover, Ingenico, Spire Payments, PAX, Verifone, Worldpay, Verifone Payzone, Paypoint, Streamline, Sagem, Samsung Bixolon, Ascom, Able, Axalta, Bixolon, Cardsave, Extech, Gemalto Magic, Matsu-Dionica Omera, Move, and new Clover Flex models, such as Ingenico IWL, ICT, iCT200, iCT 220, iCT250, iWL255, iWL252, BIO930, EFT930 Series, EFT930S-L, EFT930S, Ingenico Move 5000, Citizen CMP-10/BT Elite 710, Epson S2500THS, and others.

✅ ECO-FRIENDLY TILL ROLLS: BPA-free, recyclable, contributing to a sustainable business environment. Each set of 10 rolls is shrink-wrapped, providing extra protection from humidity during storage. This feature enhances the durability of the rolls, ensuring reliable performance even in varying environmental conditions.
✅ WARNING STRIP FEATURE: Red warning strip appears when the paper is about to run out. Ensures that you can replace the roll promptly, preventing any interruptions in your transaction processes.
